question: In WIX, what are the steps to add a Quote section to a webpage?
answer: Click the 'Add' button at the top of the editor to open the Section Design panel. Then select the 'Quote' template from the panel to add a new section with a black background and placeholder text.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Add' button located at the top of the WIX website editor interface.
The 'Section Design' panel appears on the left side of the screen, displaying various section templates.
The user selects a 'Quote' section template from the 'Section Design' panel by clicking on it.
A new section with a black background and placeholder text for an inspirational quote is added to the webpage.

question: In WIX, how do you customize the text content of a Quote section?
answer: Click the 'Title' field to type your heading, the 'Subtitle' field to add secondary text, and the 'Paragraph' field to input the main body text. Each field activates a cursor for text entry when clicked.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Title' field within the newly added 'Quote' section.
The cursor becomes active in the 'Title' field, allowing the user to type "Inspirational Quote".
The user clicks on the 'Subtitle' field within the 'Quote' section.
The cursor becomes active in the 'Subtitle' field, and the user types "TutorTube".
The user clicks on the 'Paragraph' field within the 'Quote' section.
The cursor becomes active in the 'Paragraph' field, and the user types "Keep on Learning! Keep on Improving!".

question: In WIX, how do you replace the default image in a Quote section with a custom file?
answer: Click the 'Media' option in the section settings to open the media dialog. Navigate to the 'Site Files' tab and select your desired image file to replace the placeholder image.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Media' option within the 'Quote' section settings.
A media selection dialog opens, allowing the user to choose an image or video file.
The user navigates to the 'Site Files' tab within the media selection dialog.
The user selects an image file named "5_edited_edited_edited.jpg" from the list of available files.
The selected image is inserted into the 'Quote' section, replacing the default placeholder image.

question: In WIX, what happens after you finalize layout adjustments in a Quote section?
answer: After repositioning elements using the Design tab's tools, click the 'Publish' button at the top-right corner. Confirm the action in the dialog to make all changes live on the website.
keypoints: The user adjusts the layout of the 'Quote' section using the design tools.
The text and image elements are repositioned to create a balanced and visually appealing arrangement.
The user clicks on the 'Publish' button located at the top-right corner of the WIX website editor interface.
A confirmation dialog appears, prompting the user to finalize and publish the changes made to the webpage.
The user clicks on the 'Confirm' button within the confirmation dialog.
The webpage is published, and the changes are live on the TutorTube website.

question: In WIX, where can you find the design customization options for a Quote section?
answer: Design options for the Quote section are located in the 'Design' tab of the editor interface, which becomes visible after clicking the tab.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Design' tab within the WIX website editor interface.
The design options for the 'Quote' section become visible, allowing customization of colors, fonts, and layout.
